reply:
[[BLOCK:p_0]]
Lecturer Introduction

[[BLOCK:p_1]]
Gong Wen

[[BLOCK:p_2]]
Ph.D. in Psychology, Beijing Normal University (1997, Psychometrics (心理测量学))

[[BLOCK:p_3]]
Associate Professor, School of Business, Beijing Technology and Business University

[[BLOCK:p_5]]
Background: In the early 1990s, founded one of the earliest consulting firms in China specializing in Talent Assessment (人才评估), bringing Western theories and tools of Talent Assessment to domestic talent selection. Joined Founder Group in 2000 and led the development of China's first network-based psychological assessment tool, the "北大方正专业评估系统," in 2002. For over a decade, this product has maintained the highest market share in China as a College Entrance Guidance Tool (高考升学指导工具) and was the first profitable online psychological assessment tool in the country. Returned to academia in 2005, balancing teaching responsibilities with roles as a corporate management consultant, external lecturer, and Executive Coach (高管教练).

[[BLOCK:p_7]]
Areas of Expertise: Dedicated to applying Positive Psychology (积极心理学) theories to corporate management, particularly in Human Resource Management (人力资源管理) practices. Possesses over 30 years of hands-on experience in Talent Assessment and selection, learning and development, and Leadership Development (领导力开发). Published more than 20 related papers in core journals such as "Peking University Business Review," "China and Foreign Management," "China Human Resources Development," "Future and Development," and "Enterprise Management," with several papers indexed by CSSCI.

[[BLOCK:p_9]]
University Courses: Teaches courses for undergraduates, academic postgraduates, and MBA students, including "Management," "Organizational Behavior (组织行为学)," "Human Resource Management," "Self-Awareness and Self-Management," "Selected Readings from Zizhi Tongjian," and "Leadership and Team Empowerment."
